recommendedActions: Deploy mechanical desilting machinery to extract accumulated plastic waste and construction debris from the primary culvert
Conduct a CCTV inspection of the drain network extending 500 meters upstream to identify structural collapses or illegal sewage tap-ins
Clear vegetative overgrowth and blockages at the Agara Lake outfall weir to restore hydraulic flow capacity
Install temporary sediment traps at strategic points to prevent recurring silt buildup during the upcoming monsoon cycle
dependencies: BBMP Engineering Department for heavy equipment deployment
Bangalore Water Supply and Sewerage Board (BWSSB) for diversion of illegal sewage lines
Lake Development Division for coordinating clearing operations near the water body buffer zone
